name: Mock Chicken Stuffing
recipeIngredient: 2 cups cooked rice (can be leftover refrigerated, not too old or dry)
2 German celery stalks (they're one of the easiest veggies to grow, very savory)
recipeInstructions:
1. Boil some water and add couscous, chopped up celery stalks, and dried fruit.
Cook for 4 minutes or until couscous is tender. Drain the water.
2. Blend the steaming hot couscous with the cold cooked rice, add nutritional yeast,
and stir to combine. Add salt to taste.
Serve immediately. This mixture tastes savory and has a chicken-like flavor, with
the yeast adding extra flavor and nutrients.
